title: Add automated staging deployment
body:
This PR adds automated staging deployment for faster development workflow.

## What's New

### Files Added
- `.github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml` — GitHub Actions workflow
- `docker-compose.staging.yml` — Local build compose file
- `deploy-staging.sh` — Deploy script for VPS

## How It Works

1. Push to any feature branch (not main)
2. GitHub Actions automatically deploys to VPS via SSH
3. VPS builds locally from the branch (no GHCR needed)
4. Test at `http://187.124.180.141:8080`
5. If good -> merge to main

## Required Setup

### 1. Generate SSH Key on VPS
```bash
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "github-actions" -f ~/.ssh/github_deploy
cat ~/.ssh/github_deploy.pub >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
cat ~/.ssh/github_deploy  # Copy private key
```

### 2. Add GitHub Secrets
Go to: https://github.com/candyscode/AI/settings/secrets/actions

| Secret | Value |
|--------|-------|
| `VPS_SSH_KEY` | Private key (full content) |
| `VPS_HOST` | `187.124.180.141` |
| `VPS_USER` | `root` |

### 3. Prepare Staging on VPS
```bash
cd ~
git clone https://github.com/candyscode/AI.git knx-viz
cd knx-viz
chmod +x deploy-staging.sh
```

## After This PR

Your new workflow:
1. "Make feature X"
2. I code -> push to branch
3. Automatic deploy -> `http://187.124.180.141:8080`
4. You test -> feedback
5. Merge if good

No more manual PR reviews before testing!

## Testing This PR

After merging:
1. Go to Actions tab -> 'Deploy to Staging VPS'
2. Click 'Run workflow' -> select this branch
3. Check if it deploys successfully
head: add-staging-deployment
